title: Backend Engineer / Java Developer
description: Who are we? Our business is technology, food and retail. We are a young team that combines all resources with technology; Our goal is to provide an excellent e-commerce service to meet your needs. In short, you can call us Migros One. 😉 Today, as a team that holds the “Great Place To Work” certificate with the contributions of our employees we produce, learn and develop together. We rediscover our passion for our business every day and build Migros One culture together. Our Culture We are #ONE to create a better tomorrow for our community. Our way of working includes four core values that we strive to act: 1. Take accountability with passion 2. Drive innovation with curiosity 3. Make a difference for our customers 4. Create open communication We live these values every day and create an environment where everyone enjoys working. Our business culture based on trust, openness and innovation has been recognized with our “Great Place To Work” certificate! What Do We Do? As Migros One; We spread happiness in being the pioneer of innovation in the field of food and retail technology with our brands Migros Sanal Market, Migros Hemen, Migros Extra, Migros Yemek, Macroonline, Tazedirekt, Mion and Petimo! Our determination to find fast and effective solutions always keeps us one step ahead. Our team's passion and energy make their jobs enjoyable. Thanks to our people-oriented approach, we aim to create a more comfortable and practical world for everyone by using them all. We constantly strive to provide the best experience to our consumers and employees!As Migros One team, we get excited with every member of our team creating his/her own career story! If you would like to be a part of this visionary and tech-savvy e-commerce team, don’t wait! Make your application! We are looking for Backend Engineer who will be on our team. What You'll Be Doing: Contributing the software development lifecycle. (technical design, implementation, testing, deployment, monitoring) Collaborate with cross-functional teams. Develop and maintain scalable and reliable backend systems. Monitor and optimize system performance. What You'll Bring: Minimum 4 years of experience as a back-end engineer, Production experience with Java and Spring Boot Hands-on experience with OOP, Design Patterns and TDD Hands-on experience with microservice architecture Experience with Restful API design Familiar with event-driven systems and technologies (SQS, Apache Kafka) AWS, Docker, Kubernetes knowledge is nice-to-have

title: PHP Yazılım Geliştirici
description: ROMA Teknoloji olarak, kendi iç yazılımlarımız ve B2B sistemlerimiz üzerinde çalışacak PHP yazılım geliştiricileri arıyoruz. Genel Nitelikler: PHP yazılım dili üzerinden en az 3 yıl deneyimli, MySQL veritabanı yönetiminde tecrübeli Laravel - Codeigniter gibi frameworklerde tecrübeli, HTML + CSS + JS yazılım dillerinde orta düzeyde bilgi sahibi, Erkek adaylar için askerliğini tamamlamış olması tercih sebebi olacaktır. İş Tanımı: Mevcut web sitelerimiz ve yazılım projelerimizde düzenleme ve geliştirme yapabilecek. Takım çalışmasına yatkın. REST API kullanımı ve yazımı konusunda tecrübeli, Veritabanı bakımı ve optimizasyonu konusunda tecrübeli, Temel düzeyde HTML + CSS + JS bilgisi ile basit frontend işlemlerini gerçekleştirebilecek, yazılım geliştiricileri arıyoruz.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Who Are We? At Kami, we are redefining next-generation storytelling. As a data-driven transmedia ecosystem, we bring webtoons, vertical dramas, and interactive stories under one roof tailored for Gen-Z. We are building the "YouTube model for fiction," empowering creators to monetize their work from Day 1. We are now looking for a visionary and highly versatile Full Stack Developer (React Native & Node.js) to be the technical backbone of our core product team, driving our "Creator Economy" and transmedia vision forward! The Focus of the Role In this role, you will take end-to-end ownership of our ecosystem's most critical features, from database architecture to the final mobile user experience. Working closely with our Product and Design teams, you will integrate cutting-edge AI models, scale our backend to support millions of users, and build seamless mobile interfaces for our creators. You will be both the architect and the executor of our technical roadmap. Key Responsibilities: End-to-End Execution: Build, scale, and maintain features across our entire stack, from our Express.js/MongoDB backend to our React Native (TypeScript) mobile application. AI & Transmedia Integrations: Implement and optimize the technical infrastructure for our core AI features, utilizing OpenAI SDKs, vector databases, and our proprietary algorithms for "Story AI" and "AI Character Chat". Scalable Architecture: Design high-performance RESTful APIs, manage our NoSQL (MongoDB) databases, and utilize caching (Redis) to ensure a flawless experience for a rapidly growing global user base. You Are a Great Fit If You Have: 3+ years of Full Stack development experience, with deep expertise in both React Native (mobile frontend) and Node.js/Express (backend). A strong grasp of TypeScript and modern state management practices (Zustand, TanStack Query). Hands-on experience with NoSQL databases ( MongoDB ) and caching mechanisms ( Redis ). Experience integrating third-party APIs, payment gateways (IAP), and AI services (OpenAI). A product-oriented mindset: You don't just write code; you care deeply about user experience, product metrics, and business goals. A deep passion for the Creator Economy, digital storytelling, and building a global transmedia universe. Why Kami? We offer you the chance to make decisions that will directly impact millions of users across the globe and disrupt a multi-billion dollar entertainment industry. If you are ready to write a global success story with an ambitious, and fast-moving team, apply now and let's scale this engine together!

title: React Native Developer
company: Mavi Uçak Bilişim ve İleri Teknoloji A.Ş.
description: İş Tanımı Mobil ekibimize katılacak, React Native konusunda deneyimli bir Mobile Application Developer arıyoruz. Bu rolde ürün ve backend ekipleriyle yakın çalışarak kullanıcı odaklı, ölçeklenebilir mobil çözümler geliştirmen beklenmektedir. Android tarafında native deneyim taşıyan adaylar öncelikli değerlendirmeye alınacaktır. Sorumluluklar React Native kullanarak iOS ve Android uygulamalar geliştirmek ve sürdürmek App Store ve Google Play yayınlama süreçlerine aktif olarak katkı sağlamak (signing, build, store submission) Mevcut mobil uygulamaların performansını, güvenliğini ve kullanıcı deneyimini iyileştirmek UI/UX tasarımlarını mobil uygulamaya doğru ve etkili şekilde uyarlamak Backend ekipleri ile birlikte API entegrasyonlarını gerçekleştirmek Hata analizi, debugging ve bakım süreçlerini yürütmek Kod kalitesini artırmak amacıyla best practice’leri uygulamak Yeni teknolojileri ve mobil geliştirme trendlerini takip etmek Aranan Nitelikler Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya ilgili bölümlerden mezun React Native ile mobil uygulama geliştirme konusunda en az 2-4 yıl deneyim JavaScript ve/veya TypeScript bilgisi REST API entegrasyonları konusunda deneyim Git kullanımına hakim App Store ve Google Play yayınlama süreçleri konusunda deneyim sahibi Problem çözme ve analitik düşünme becerisi yüksek Ekip çalışmasına yatkın Teknik İngilizce dokümantasyonu takip edebilecek seviyede İngilizce Tercih Sebepleri NFC ve Bluetooth teknolojileri konusunda deneyimli Android tarafında native (Kotlin/Java) deneyim Redux Toolkit ile state management deneyimi Firebase (Crashlytics, push notification, analytics) entegrasyon tecrübesi React Navigation, Formik/Yup gibi yaygın RN ekosistemi kütüphanelerine hakimiyet Performans optimizasyonu ve güvenlik iyileştirmeleri konusunda deneyim Biz Ne Sunuyoruz Dinamik ve teknoloji odaklı bir çalışma ortamı Esnek çalışma modeli Etki alanı yüksek projelerde sorumluluk alma fırsatı Gelişim ve öğrenme odaklı ekip kültürü Uzun vadeli kariyer fırsatı

title: Senior Full Stack Developer
description: SENIOR FULL STACK DEVELOPER 🎯 Join us, learn from us, teach us. Let’s make a difference, together! Fiyuu was established to provide corporate courier support to companies that aim to deliver the necessities of busy city dwellers and professionals exactly when and where they need them, in a timely and reliable manner. Fiyuu couriers, carefully selected and trained through a corporate education process, operate within a high-tech system that is centrally managed and continuously monitored. This system enables us to offer efficient and reliable delivery solutions to businesses in need. 👩 💻 What You’ll Be Doing? Apply modern software development practices within a multi-service architecture. Create and review well-structured design documents for microservices and distributed systems. Develop clean, maintainable, and scalable code while contributing to code review processes. Analyze existing systems and propose performance, scalability, and reliability improvements. Collaborate with the team to ensure the successful completion of sprint goals. Prepare technical documentation and support stakeholder communication. Identify technical risks and contribute to solution planning. Actively develop and maintain unit, integration, and component tests. ✍️ What You’ll Bring? Minimum 7 years of experience in software development. Hands-on Full Stack development experience (frontend and backend) with a strong backend focus. Experience working with Agile/Scrum methodologies. Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking skills. Excellent teamwork and communication abilities. Good command of Turkish and English. A growth mindset, openness to innovation, and passion for building high-quality software. 💻 Tech Stack & Requirements: Frontend Development: React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript Performance optimization and memory management Backend Development: Node.js, Nest.js, TypeScript Authentication & Authorization (JWT, OAuth2) Databases & Storage: DynamoDB, PostgreSQL, MS SQL Server Database design and optimization Redis caching strategies Message Queue technologies (Kafka, AWS SQS) Testing & Quality Assurance: Jest (Unit Testing) Integration Testing (TestContainers) ESLint, Prettier, SonarQube (quality) DevOps & Cloud familiarity: CI/CD tools (GitLab CI) AWS (EKS, S3, Lambda) Containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes) ⭐ Nice to Have: Cloud & Infrastructure: Multi-cloud experience Serverless architectures (AWS Lambda, Azure Functions) Event-driven architecture API Gateway experience Domain Experience: E-commerce or logistics industry experience Real-time systems Payment integrations and financial systems Data processing & streaming platforms (Apache Kafka, Kinesis) Monitoring & Analytics: Instana, Sentry, ELK Stack, CloudWatch 📝 Our Recruitment Process: Application Technical Assessment Personality Inventory Interview Reference Check Offer Process If you are passionate about cutting-edge technologies and want to make a meaningful impact, we’d love to hear from you! 🚀

title: Backend Engineer
description: Apilex is a global legaltech company building AI that transforms how legal professionals work. Powered by a proprietary database of 200M+ court decisions and legal documents, our platform delivers semantic search, contract analysis, and automated legal drafting — turning days of legal research into seconds. Since our founding, we've grown to a team of 90+ people and established ourselves as Türkiye's leading AI legal assistant. Now, we're taking it global — expanding into France, Germany, Brasil, Italy and Spain to compete in the billion-dollar legaltech market. What sets us apart? We don't use off-the-shelf AI. We build domain-specific, closed-circuit AI models with multi-layered verification systems that eliminate hallucinations and deliver answers backed by real citations and legal reasoning. Every feature we ship changes how lawyers work, not in theory, but in practice. We are hiring a Backend Engineer to help develop and scale the microservices that form the backbone of our global legal AI platform. Key Responsibilities Scalable Development: Develop and maintain high-traffic microservices to support our expanding global footprint. Code Quality: Deliver clean, well-tested, and maintainable code while actively participating in code review processes. Feature Ownership: Take ownership of backend tasks, collaborating closely with senior engineers to implement complex features. System Integration: Assist in building and maintaining reliable integrations between core services, AI agents, and large-scale data stores. Performance Optimization: Help optimize system reliability and latency across distributed services through efficient caching and messaging strategies. What We’re Looking For 2+ years of backend experience building and maintaining Java and Spring Boot applications in production. Good understanding of software design principles, including OOP and SOLID principles. Hands-on experience with relational databases ( PostgreSQL ) and NoSQL databases ( MongoDB ). Familiarity with Elasticsearch or similar technologies for high-performance search and indexing. Basic understanding or practical experience with messaging systems like RabbitMQ/Kafka and in-memory caching with Redis . Exposure to WebSocket and real-time streaming architectures is a plus. Familiarity with cloud platforms and automated CI/CD pipelines. An agile mindset: Ability to ship high-quality code and iterate quickly rather than waiting for perfect conditions. Why join us? We're building the AI that lawyers rely on every day, across every area of their practice — the core of how thousands of legal professionals research, draft, and reason. You'll join a team solving one of the hardest challenges in AI: making it reliable enough for high-stakes, real-world decisions. We're scaling across Europe and Latin America, shipping fast, and setting the bar for what reliable AI looks like in legal. Whatever your role, your work here will be visible and meaningful. We're one of the fastest-growing AI companies in Türkiye, and we're looking for ambitious people who want to build the future of legal technology on a global stage. This is Apilex. AI for Legal. Join us.

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: Apilex is a global legaltech company building AI that transforms how legal professionals work. Powered by a proprietary database of 200M+ court decisions and legal documents, our platform delivers semantic search, contract analysis, and automated legal drafting — turning days of legal research into seconds. Since our founding, we've grown to a team of 90+ people and established ourselves as Türkiye's leading AI legal assistant. Technical Leadership: Provide mentorship to the engineering team and guide technical decision-making for complex features. Join us.

title: React Native Developer
description: About Astairo Astairo is an AI-powered astrology & spiritual guidance app helping people better understand themselves, their relationships, emotions and life direction. Through astrology, birth charts, soulmate insights and personalized AI guidance, we help users explore who they are and where they’re going. Since launching in late 2025, Astairo has grown to more than 160,000 users globally and generated over 20M+ organic impressions across TikTok, Instagram and YouTube — all in under 6 months. What makes this journey especially exciting is that this growth has been achieved primarily through organic channels, creator-led content, feature-led growth and rapid experimentation. We're still early in the journey. The product has gained strong initial traction, but there is still significant opportunity to improve, expand and scale over the coming years. Today, Astairo is available in English, Turkish, French and German, with localization efforts continuing as we expand into new markets. The US, Europe and MENA regions are key focus areas for our next stage of growth as we continue building a product designed for a global audience. We're a small team based in Istanbul, building for users around the world. Decisions are made quickly, ideas are tested fast and product feedback reaches the people building it. Why This Role Matters You'll be working directly with the founder and taking full ownership of our mobile product — from new AI features and backend integrations to release management, analytics and performance. This is not a role where someone else defines the architecture and hands you tickets. You'll contribute to technical decisions, identify what needs to be built and ship features that reach real users fast. We're looking for someone who wants more than a development role. Someone who enjoys building products, making technical decisions, solving real user problems and helping shape how a global AI consumer app grows. If you want to see your work directly impact a product used by hundreds of thousands of people around the world, this is the right place. What You'll Do Mobile Own the React Native iOS & Android application end-to-end Build and ship new AI-powered product features Manage App Store and Google Play release processes Improve performance, stability and crash resolution Backend & Integrations Develop and maintain backend APIs and services Work with queue-based async processing systems Integrate and extend third-party AI, analytics, subscription and cloud services Build reliable push notification, deep linking and attribution flows Infrastructure & Analytics Own event tracking architecture across mobile and backend Improve deployment processes and production monitoring Support A/B testing, retention experiments and funnel analytics Product, UX & Execution ·      Turn Figma designs and AI-generated design concepts into pixel-accurate, production-ready mobile screens ·      Collaborate on UI/UX improvements, new design directions and interface redesigns as the product evolves ·      Identify usability, onboarding, conversion and retention opportunities through both user behavior and product intuition Technical Direction Contribute to product and technical roadmap discussions with the founder Partner closely with product, growth and design initiatives to help shape what gets built and why Make architecture decisions for a product scaling from 160K users toward its next stage of global growth Balance shipping speed with engineering quality, scalability and long-term maintainability What We Look For We're looking for someone who has built and maintained production mobile applications, understands the realities of scaling products used by real users and can take ownership beyond implementation. Degree in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering or a related technical field 3–5 years of professional experience with React Native and/or Expo or similar mobile technologies, including shipping and maintaining live production apps on iOS and Android Strong JavaScript and TypeScript fundamentals Backend development experience with Node.js and REST API design NoSQL database experience (MongoDB or similar) Experience with cloud infrastructure services (Azure, GCP, or AWS) Firebase experience — Analytics, Crashlytics, Cloud Messaging Experience with third-party SDK integrations, authentication and webhook systems Experience with subscription and in-app purchase flows (Adapty, RevenueCat, or similar) Experience with mobile analytics and event tracking platforms (Mixpanel or similar) Experience with queue-based architectures and async job processing iOS and Android release process experience — App Store Connect, Google Play Console, EAS Build Strong debugging, crash investigation and production problem-solving skills AI-assisted development mindset — actively uses tools like Cursor, Claude Code or similar; can direct AI effectively and evaluate output critically rather than shipping it blindly Comfortable working from Figma designs, AI-generated design concepts and contributing to product and user experience improvements when needed Ability to use analytics, user behavior data and product metrics to inform technical and product decisions Product-minded thinking, strong ownership mentality and ability to move fast without sacrificing quality Good written and spoken English Based in Istanbul, available for occasional in-person meetups What You'll Get Every feature you ship, every system you improve and every technical decision you make will directly influence how a global product grows. Full technical ownership from day one — real decisions, real impact Direct daily collaboration with the founder on product and technical direction Fast shipping culture — ideas become features in days, not quarters Exposure to AI consumer products, personalization systems and global mobile growth A seat at the table when important product and technical decisions are made The chance to help shape a product from an early growth stage and be part of the value created as the company scales
